name: use-intersection
description: Know when an element enters the viewport via IntersectionObserver — the engine behind lazy-loading, infinite scroll and reveal-on-scroll. Callback ref, SSR-safe, with an optional once mode.

intents: know when an element scrolls into view
lazy-load or reveal content when it becomes visible
build infinite scroll with an IntersectionObserver
examples:
const { ref, isIntersecting } = useIntersection({ rootMargin: '200px' }); return
{isIntersecting && }
;
